sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Monster Combat
special_mechanics.description: Six selectable giant monsters engage in close-range fighting with punch, kick, and grab mechanics. Player controls a giant kaiju character, not a traditional platformer protagonist.

tier_notes: Tier 3 (qualitative) - King of the Monsters is a fighting game, not a platformer. Wikipedia source contains only gameplay overview, character descriptions, and release information. No movement physics parameters, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system data are documented. The game's mechanics revolve around arena-based monster combat (punching, kicking, grappling) rather than platforming movement.
